Flag tool calls that perform writes outside the user-declared scope.
Flag destructive operations (delete/reset/force-push) unless the user explicitly asked for them in this session.
Flag edits to protected surfaces (.project/**, .github/workflows/**, packages/tractor/**, packages/tractor-ts/**, packages/plugin-manifest/**) when explicit authorization is missing.
When user intent is ambiguous, classify as unauthorized and request confirmation before action.

text: Treat edits on `.project/**`, `.github/workflows/**`, `packages/tractor/**`, `packages/tractor-ts/**`, and `packages/plugin-manifest/**` as unauthorized unless the user explicitly approved that scope.
Require explicit confirmation before destructive commands (`rm`, force push, hard reset, mass delete), unless directly requested by the user.
